title: Director's Cut: FundedElite — A Trilogy of Trading Excellence
description: FundedElite unveils a cinematic trilogy of deals: a $1.70 flash activation, 21% off, and 30% off challenges with up to 95% profit split.
seo_content:
FundedElite Multiple Deals: GREEN170, LUCKY21 & GOLD30

FundedElite has launched a trilogy of simultaneous promotions, each targeting a different type of trader need. Use code GREEN170 to activate a $1.70 flash account, LUCKY21 for 21% off all challenges, or GOLD30 for the maximum 30% discount on challenge fees. All three codes are active through March 17, 2026, and can be used on any FundedElite challenge account with up to a 95% profit split for funded traders.

FundedElite is a European proprietary trading firm known for its institutional trust, TradeLocker platform, and the Free Retry Program that provides traders with a no-cost second attempt under qualifying conditions. The firm has built a loyal following by consistently offering transparent conditions, reliable payouts, and one of the most generous profit split structures in the industry at 95%. This trilogy of codes reflects the firm's commitment to making professional prop trading accessible at multiple price points.

Each code serves a distinct purpose: GREEN170 is a flash activation that provides a real funded account for as little as $1.70 — an entry point so low it is essentially risk-free for any trader who wants to experience FundedElite's environment first-hand. LUCKY21 offers a mid-range 21% saving for traders seeking a balanced discount on standard account sizes. GOLD30 delivers the maximum 30% reduction for those making a larger investment in a professional challenge account and wanting the deepest possible savings.

FundedElite's trading conditions apply uniformly across all challenge tiers: profit targets and drawdown limits defined at evaluation start, TradeLocker platform access, a 95% profit split on funded accounts, and the Free Retry Program as a safety net. All three promotions are valid on the same account catalog, so the choice of code depends only on which savings structure best suits your plan.

To redeem any of these codes, visit FundedElite via the affiliate link above before the March 17, 2026 expiry. Select your desired challenge size and enter either GREEN170, LUCKY21, or GOLD30 at checkout depending on which discount tier you prefer. The savings will be applied immediately. Note that only one code can be used per transaction — choose the code that offers the most value for your selected account size.
